scenarios.description: outputSettings() returns the default OutputSettings instance
scenarios.expectedResult: returned OutputSettings is the same instance as doc.outputSettings field, with default charset UTF-8, syntax html, escapeMode base, prettyPrint true, outline false, indentAmount 1, maxPaddingWidth 30

scenarios.description: outputSettings() reflects a custom OutputSettings set via setter
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example.com"); OutputSettings custom = new OutputSettings().syntax(OutputSettings.Syntax.xml).indentAmount(4).maxPaddingWidth(-1).prettyPrint(false).outline(true).escapeMode(Entities.EscapeMode.extended).charset("ISO-8859-1"); doc.outputSettings(custom);
scenarios.expectedResult: returned OutputSettings is the same instance as custom, with syntax xml, escapeMode xhtml then overridden to extended, charset ISO-8859-1, prettyPrint false, outline true, indentAmount 4, maxPaddingWidth -1
